# Werner Productions Books

> Dirk Werner (ORCID 0009-0001-7822-0041, GND 1384382429) is a licensed psychotherapist (Dipl.-Psych.) based in Fuessen, Bavaria, Germany. He writes fiction and nonfiction exploring Jungian psychology, shadow work, gnostic philosophy, and comparative mysticism. Published under Werner Productions Media.

## Books

- [Die Dreizehn Tore: Ein Fantasy-Psychothriller](https://books.werner-productions.com/die-dreizehn-tore/): German-language spiritual fiction combining fantasy with psychological thriller. A woman discovers she can read an ancient script and is drawn into a world of thirteen archetypal gates. Inspired by gnostic cosmology, Vedic Yuga cycles, and Jung's individuation.
  - ISBN: 9798233102592
  - Kindle ASIN: B0GB13C18Y
  - Taschenbuch ASIN: B0GCDQW5MG
  - Google Play E-Book: https://play.google.com/store/books/details?id=KBa4EQAAQBAJ
  - Audiobook (Google Play): https://play.google.com/store/audiobooks/details/Dirk_Werner_Die_Dreizehn_Tore?id=AQAAAECavEn8wM
  - Audiobook (Spotify): https://open.spotify.com/show/0d2FWdovJtFNvGwb9l7hKl
  - Author site: https://dirkwernerbooks.com/buecher/B0GB13C18Y-de
  - Goodreads: https://www.goodreads.com/author/show/70076437.Dirk_Werner
  - Schema: https://books.werner-productions.com/die-dreizehn-tore/schema-org.jsonld
